user.title: AI Expose Entities
user.description: Pick the AI Task that should generate exposure recommendations. The AI Task entity comes from a conversation integration such as Anthropic Conversation (Claude), Google Generative AI, or OpenAI Conversation — set one up first if the dropdown is empty.

data_description.ai_task_id: AI Task entity used to generate recommendations (for Claude, set up Anthropic Conversation and add an AI Task subentry).
data_description.entity_sample_size: Maximum number of entities sent to the AI in a single run. If you have more entities than this, a random sample is used.
data_description.custom_prompt_enabled: Override the built-in prompt used to generate recommendations.
data_description.custom_prompt: Your prompt is prepended to the built-in instructions. Use {entity_list} as a placeholder if you want it embedded explicitly.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure AI Expose Entities
reconfigure.description: Update which AI Task is used to generate recommendations for {name}.

data_description.ai_task_id: AI Task entity used to generate recommendations.
data_description.entity_sample_size: Maximum number of entities sent to the AI in a single run.
data_description.custom_prompt_enabled: Override the built-in prompt used to generate recommendations.
data_description.custom_prompt: Your prompt is prepended to the built-in instructions. Use {entity_list} as a placeholder if you want it embedded explicitly.

abort.no_ai_tasks:
No AI Task entities were found.

This integration needs an AI Task to call. To use Claude, set up Home Assistant's built-in **Anthropic Conversation** integration with your Anthropic API key, then add an **AI Task** subentry from it (Settings → Devices & Services → Anthropic Conversation → Configure → Add subentry → AI Task).

Once an `ai_task.*` entity exists, restart this setup.

init.title: AI Expose Entities options
init.description: Adjust how recommendations are generated and scheduled.

data_description.ai_task_id: AI Task entity used to generate recommendations.
data_description.schedule_enabled: Run a recommendation pass automatically once per day.
data_description.schedule_time: Local time at which the daily recommendation runs.
data_description.custom_prompt_enabled: Override the built-in prompt used to generate recommendations.
data_description.custom_prompt: Your prompt is prepended to the built-in instructions.
data_description.enable_debugging: Emit detailed debug logging for troubleshooting.

options.minimal: Minimal — only a handful of entities

recommendation_failed.message: The AI Task call failed while generating recommendations.

ai_response_invalid.message: The AI Task returned a response that could not be parsed as JSON.
